nasb.text: When the jailer awoke and saw the prison doors opened, he drew his sword and was about to kill himself, supposing that the prisoners had escaped.

esv.text: When the jailer woke and saw that the prison doors were open, he drew his sword and was about to kill himself, supposing that the prisoners had escaped.

cnv.text: 獄吏醒過來，看見監門全開，以為囚犯都已經逃脫了，就拔出刀來想要自刎。

ccb.text: 狱卒惊醒后，看见牢门尽开，以为囚犯已经逃走了，就想拔刀自杀。

csbs.text: 狱卒醒来，看见监狱的门都开了，以为囚犯们已经逃跑了，就拔出刀来要自杀。
